name: Southwestern Three-Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Beans, black, canned - drained and rinsed
15 ounces Beans, pinto or black-eyed peas, canned - drained and rinsed
19 ounces Chickpeas, canned, drained and rinsed
1/2 head Lettuce, iceberg - cored and shredded
1/2 Onion, Vidalia, halved and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the drained and rinsed black beans, pinto or black-eyed peas, chickpeas, finely chopped chipotle peppers (drained and packed in adobo sauce), vinegar, oil, and cilantro.
2. Toss until well mixed. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Arrange shredded iceberg lettuce on a serving platter.
4. Mound the bean mixture over top of the lettuce.
5. Garnish with thinly sliced Vidalia onion.
6. Serves 6 as a side dish.
Per serving: 351 calories; 18 grams protein; 7 grams fat; 56 grams carbohydrates; 506 milligrams sodium; 0 grams cholesterol
